title: Step
description: Step up your vanilla experience with this mod that adds a balanced Stepping enchantment that allows you to walk up entire blocks.
body:
Step up your vanilla experience with this mod that adds a balanced Stepping enchantment that allows you to walk up entire blocks.

🚀 Latest Updates

Version 1.21.7 introduces multiple levels for the Stepping enchantment and expands mod loader compatibility!

The latest version of Step now features two levels of the enchantment. Stepping I allows you to walk up one full block, while Stepping II lets you ascend a block and a slab (1.5 blocks). This update also brings widespread compatibility, with support for Fabric, Forge, NeoForge, and Quilt.

💡 What is Step?

The Stepping enchantment can be obtained similarly to Depth Strider, via an Enchantment Table. It is a treasure enchantment that can be found at around level 20+, on diamond boots for reference. This balanced enchantment allows you to walk up blocks without needing to jump, seamlessly integrating into your vanilla gameplay.

A new feature in version 1.21.7 is the introduction of multiple enchantment levels. Older versions only included a single level.

  • Stepping I: Allows you to walk up a single full block.
  • Stepping II: Allows you to walk up the height of one block and a slab (1.5 blocks).

👪 Related Mods

This mod is part of a series of movement-focused enchantment mods. While they are not required to use Step, they were designed to complement each other. Please note that Leap may not be applicable to the same boots as Step. However, Frost Walker and Depth Strider are fully compatible with Step.

  • Dash - Adds a new boot enchantment that allows you to dash around.
  • Leap - Take a leap forward with this simple mod that adds a new enchantment for double-jumping.

🤷 FAQ (Frequently Asked Questions)

Can I use this in my modpack?

Yes, absolutely. Please provide credit to the respective authors and link back to the CurseForge page.

Can I redistribute this mod on other platforms?

Yes, however, you must ensure that all download links point directly to our official CurseForge page and that proper credit is given to all authors.

Are there multiple levels of Stepping?

Yes, as of version 1.21.7, there are two levels. Stepping I allows you to walk up a full block, and Stepping II allows for a 1.5-block step height. Please note that versions prior to 1.21.7 only had a single, non-tiered Stepping enchantment.

🌐 Translate Step - Help break the language barrier!

All translators are credited here. Thank you to everyone who helps make this mod accessible! | Flag | Language | Translators | |------|----------|-------------| | | **Русский (Russkiy)** | DrHesperus, BardinTheDwarf |

🤚 Support: If you have questions or any issues with our mods, read the FAQ! You can also either submit an issue on the issue tracker, or come into our Discord server where we can help you!
